vibe: Approachable, highly tactile, local Indonesian home-industry warmth paired with modern POS efficiency.

fonts.heading: font-sans
fonts.instructions: Use standard Inter (already loaded) but apply tracking-tight and font-black for H1/H2 to kill the 'default' feel. For numbers and stats, use tabular-nums.

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto w-full min-h-screen pb-24 relative overflow-x-hidden
spacing_and_layout.touch_targets: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, chips) MUST have min-h-[48px] or h-12 to accommodate users with flour on hands.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Use p-4 to p-6 inside cards. gap-4 for lists.

bottom_navigation.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 w-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-stone-100 pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-around items-center z-50
bottom_navigation.item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 min-w-[64px] min-h-[48px]
bottom_navigation.badge: absolute top-0 right-2 w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-rose-500

hero_card.style: bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-500 to-emerald-700 rounded-3xl p-6 text-white shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(5,150,105,0.25)] relative overflow-hidden
hero_card.decoration: Add a subtle glowing circle or abstract wave shape in the background (using pure CSS/absolute divs with opacity-10) to break flatness.

selection_chips.style: min-h-[48px] px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-bold text-sm transition-all duration-200 flex items-center justify-center border

stepper_input.container: flex items-center justify-between bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-full p-1
stepper_input.button: w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-stone-100 text-stone-700 active:bg-stone-200 transition-colors font-bold text-xl
stepper_input.value: w-12 text-center font-bold text-lg tabular-nums text-stone-900

status_badge.style: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1.5 w-fit

large_action_button.style: w-full min-h-[56px] bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white rounded-2xl font-bold text-lg shadow-lg shadow-emerald-600/20 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2

motion_and_interactions.list_stagger: Use framer-motion or CSS staggered delays for lists of orders/inventory items to slide in sequentially.

testing.rules: All interactive elements, inputs, and key data points MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='checkout-button', data-testid='order-status-chip', data-testid='attendance-check-in-btn'.

hero_product.description: High-quality churros photo for public order form header or empty states

secondary_product.description: Dark plate with churros, use for variation

bakery_brand.description: Bakery vibe background/placeholder for auth screen

instructions_to_main_agent: Design mobile-first. Assume the screen width is 390px-430px (iPhone size) and enforce max-w-md mx-auto layout.
Implement the Bottom Navigation strictly fixed to the bottom, ensuring page content has pb-24 so it doesn't get obscured.
Maintain high contrast. Crew users will use this app on the move. Large bold text and minimum 48px touch targets are mandatory.
Use Emerald-600 as the primary action color. Introduce Rose/Pink strictly for small brand accents ('Anchur') or urgent notifications.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip away the default 'Vercel-look'. Make borders rounded-3xl/2xl instead of md, and use soft shadows.
For the crew's +/- steppers, heavily rely on the UI pattern described in components.stepper_input. It must be massive and impossible to misclick.
Implement Bahasa Indonesia correctly for all strings (e.g., 'Belum Selesai', 'Lunas', 'Masuk', 'Keluar', 'Kasir').
